title: The Zoo MC Modpack
description: An easy to use modpack that has a vanilla like feel to it. We like to call it Vanilla Enhanced. We use these on our server to get better performance and to help with making the game feel a bit better.
body: The Zoo MC Modpack aims to help our users get the most out the time on our server. We share our pack to help others get the same preformace. Some mods change from time to time, but there are some staples that stay from update to update.
